message:
feat(state): honor NTM_CONFIG env var for state store path resolution

Add expandSelectedConfigPath() helper that resolves tilde-prefixed
paths (~/ and bare ~) via os.UserHomeDir. DefaultPath() now checks
NTM_CONFIG first, placing state.db alongside the selected config
file. This gives NTM_CONFIG highest precedence, followed by
XDG_CONFIG_HOME, then ~/.config/ntm — matching the priority order
used by the config loader.

State test improvements:
- Switch from manual os.Setenv/defer to t.Setenv for automatic
  cleanup and parallel-safety
- Explicitly clear XDG_CONFIG_HOME in TestOpenDefault to prevent
  env leakage from other tests
- Add TestOpenDefaultRespectsXDGConfigHome to verify XDG path
- Add TestOpenDefaultRespectsNTMConfigPath to verify NTM_CONFIG
  takes precedence over both XDG and HOME
- Move rows.Close() to defer position in TestMigrate to prevent
  resource leaks on early test failures
- Add rows.Err() check after iteration loop per database/sql
  best practices

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
